name: Sausage Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, cornmeal, grated parmesan cheese, sugar, baking powder, and 3/4 teaspoon salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Combine eggs, milk, and oil; add all at once to the dry ingredients, stirring until moist and lumpy.
4. Fold in the cooked crumbled sausage.
5. Fill greased muffin cups 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.
